_comment: Phase 2 provisional allowlist per D-07. openai/gpt-5.4 is provisional — RESEARCH.md §Open Questions Q1 resolves this as: use ID verbatim per CONTEXT.md; live verification happens during EVAL-01a (Phase 1 D-OP-01 gated); documented fallback is openai/gpt-5.3-chat if /models call confirms absence.
